title: TCPDelayMod
body: # TCPDelayMod I'm a big fan of 1.7.10 and I think we should all go back to 1.7.10. Unfortunately, for some reason everyone wants to stay on 1.8.9. :angry: So I thought, "Hey, what if I bring 1.7.10 to 1.8.9!" Introducing, TCPDelayMod. TCPDelay purposefully adds delay by undoing the fix that was added in 1.8.1 and by prplz in his ever so famous 1.7 mod. Just as god intended. ## Modpack? PLEASE DO NOT INCLUDE THIS IN A MODPACK. THERE IS NO REASON TO DOWNLOAD THIS MOD.
